scripts.install:all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd backend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "cyan.bold,magenta.bold" --kill-others "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:wipe: concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "cyan.bold,magenta.bold" --kill-others "cd backend && npm run dev:wipe" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "blue.bold,green.bold" --kill-others "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm start"
